title: 8 Herbal Teas For Loss Of Appetite
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas contains licorice root, which has been used for centuries to stimulate appetite and alleviate digestive issues. The tea's main constituents, glycyrrhizin and flavonoids, work together to soothe the stomach and promote digestion. Glycyrrhizin, in particular, helps to balance the body's cortisol levels, which can become imbalanced and lead to loss of appetite. When cortisol levels are low, the body's natural hunger response is suppressed, making it harder to feel ...
